name: Swivel Accent Chair Tan - Threshold™
description:
Embrace a modern aesthetic with the Swivel Accent Chair from Threshold™. This accent chair features a chic, round shape in a tan color. With an upholstered design on a plywood frame, it's made of polyester material and swivels to offer comfortable, adjustable seating. It perfectly complements your study or living room, offering an elevated look to any space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
